data.title: Ares Real Estate Income Trust Reports Higher January NAV
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Div Cap Dvs Ppt Shs -A- ( (ZDPFAX) ) has issued an announcement.

Ares Real Estate Income Trust Inc. reported that its net asset value per Fund Interest rose to $8.1020 as of January 31, 2026, up from $8.0353 at year‑end 2025, implying Aggregate Fund NAV of $3.16 billion across 390.1 million Fund Interests. The NAV is derived under board‑approved valuation procedures with Altus Group U.S. Inc. as independent valuation advisor, incorporating monthly appraisals of real properties and related debt assets, while excluding future distribution fee liabilities from the NAV calculation.

The trust detailed a largely stable portfolio with $8.62 billion in total investments, a leverage ratio of 34.9% and a 94.8% leased rate on 144 properties as of January 31, 2026. It also disclosed January 2026 gross capital raises of about $114.2 million, common stock and OP Unit redemptions of $7.8 million redeemed on February 1, 2026, and payment of a January monthly distribution of $0.03450 per share, underscoring ongoing fundraising, liquidity management and income distributions for investors.

More about Div Cap Dvs Ppt Shs -A-

Ares Real Estate Income Trust Inc. is a U.S. non‑traded real estate investment trust focused on a diversified portfolio of income‑producing properties. Its holdings span residential, industrial, retail, office, self‑storage and data center assets, along with real estate debt, securities and Delaware statutory trust programs aimed at raising capital from private investors.

As of January 31, 2026, the trust’s consolidated portfolio comprised 144 properties totaling about 30.5 million square feet across 34 U.S. markets, with an overall leased rate of 94.8%. The company also invests through unconsolidated joint ventures and finances select DST interests, positioning it as a diversified income‑oriented player in private real estate markets.

Find detailed analytics on ZDPFAX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NetraMark to Uplist Shares to Toronto Stock Exchange
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NetraMark Holdings ( (TSE:AIAI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

NetraMark Holdings Inc. will voluntarily delist its common shares from the Canadian Securities Exchange on February 17, 2026, and begin trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange on February 18 under its existing symbol AIAI, while maintaining listings on the OTCQB and Frankfurt exchanges. The move keeps the company a reporting issuer in Canada and requires no action from shareholders.

Management positions the TSX uplisting as a key milestone that underscores NetraMark’s operational progress and is expected to strengthen its visibility and positioning in the capital markets. By aligning its AI-powered NetraAI platform with a senior exchange listing, the company aims to deepen engagement with institutional investors and pharmaceutical stakeholders as it pursues broader commercial adoption of its clinical trial analytics technology.

More about NetraMark Holdings

NetraMark Holdings Inc. is a healthcare technology company specializing in AI-driven clinical trial optimization and precision patient stratification for the pharmaceutical industry. Its core platform, NetraAI, leverages generative AI and machine learning with topology-based algorithms to segment small patient datasets, identify disease subtypes, and classify patients by drug sensitivity and treatment efficacy.

Average Trading Volume: 55,906

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$91.81M

See more insights into AIAI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

CSP ( (CSPI) ) has provided an update.

At CSP’s 2026 Annual Meeting held on February 10, 2026, shareholders representing 7,765,027 shares formed a quorum and elected four directors, Victor Dellovo, Ismail “Izzy” Azeri, Anthony Folger, and Stephen Webber, to serve until the 2027 Annual Meeting. Investors also approved on an advisory basis the compensation of the company’s named executive officers and ratified CBIZ US, LLP as CSP’s independent auditors for fiscal 2026, reinforcing continuity in both leadership and external financial oversight.

These voting outcomes indicate strong shareholder support for the existing board slate, executive pay practices, and audit arrangements, suggesting stability in CSP’s governance framework. Such continuity may provide stakeholders with confidence in the company’s strategic direction and financial reporting integrity as it moves through the 2026 fiscal year.

data.title: AXO Copper Files Final Prospectus for $35 Million Bought Deal Offering
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

AXO Copper Corp. ( (TSE:AXO) ) has issued an announcement.

AXO Copper Corp. has filed a final short form prospectus in connection with a bought deal public offering of units priced at $0.70, aiming to raise $35 million in gross proceeds through the sale of common shares and accompanying warrants. The offering, led by Desjardins Capital Markets and BMO Capital Markets with TSX Venture Exchange conditional listing approval, includes an over-allotment option that could lift total proceeds to $40.25 million, bolstering the company’s funding capacity for its Mexican exploration and development projects and potentially enhancing its visibility in Canadian capital markets.

The financing will be conducted across most Canadian provinces and in certain international jurisdictions under applicable securities laws, with closing expected on or about February 19, 2026, subject to customary conditions. By securing this capital through a broadly marketed bought deal structure, AXO Copper strengthens its balance sheet and supports continued work on its La Huerta and San Antonio properties, developments that may be closely watched by investors seeking exposure to copper and gold exploration in Mexico.

More about AXO Copper Corp.

AXO Copper Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on advancing the La Huerta copper discovery in Jalisco, Mexico, and the San Antonio gold property, a past-producing oxide copper mine in Sonora, Mexico. The company targets base and precious metal projects in Mexico, positioning itself within the junior resource and exploration segment of the mining sector.

Average Trading Volume: 260,149

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Graco Director Brett Carter Resigns From Company Board
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Graco ( (GGG) ) has issued an announcement.

Graco Inc. announced that director Brett C. Carter notified its board on February 12, 2026, of his decision to resign from the board effective February 13, 2026. Carter, who served on the Audit Committee and the Management Organization and Compensation Committee and whose term was scheduled to run until the 2027 annual meeting, stated that his departure was not due to any disagreement with management or the board but to pursue other commitments.

The resignation removes an experienced voice from two key oversight committees, requiring Graco to adjust its board and committee composition ahead of the originally expected end of his term. While the company emphasized the absence of conflict surrounding his exit, investors and governance watchers may focus on how swiftly and with what profile of candidate Graco fills the resulting board and committee vacancies.

The most recent analyst rating on (GGG) stock is a Hold with a $85.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Graco stock, see the GGG Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GGG is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by excellent financial quality (strong profitability, minimal leverage, and high-quality cash flow) and a solid earnings-call outlook highlighting operational improvements and cash returns. These strengths are partially offset by a premium valuation and a cautious near-term growth profile (low single-digit organic guidance) despite favorable technical trends.

To see Spark’s full report on GGG stock, click here.

More about Graco

Graco Inc. is an industrial manufacturer that operates through a board of directors and specialized committees, including an Audit Committee and a Management Organization and Compensation Committee. data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Gulf Keystone Petroleum ( (GB:GKP) ) has shared an update.

Gulf Keystone Petroleum has completed a NOK 11.3 million retail share offering, issuing 538,087 new shares, including underwriting commission, at a 10% discount to recent London trading levels to meet requirements for a dual listing. The oversubscribed placement brought in about 700 new shareholders and increases the company’s issued share capital to 217.5 million shares, with no treasury stock.

The Oslo Stock Exchange has approved Gulf Keystone’s admission to trading on Euronext Growth Oslo, with the new shares and transferred existing shares expected to start trading on 18 February 2026 alongside a parallel London listing. Major shareholders are supporting additional transfers, and the company plans cross-border transfer arrangements between Oslo and London and an eventual move to the OSE’s Main Market, which should broaden its investor base and enhance liquidity.

data.title: Altiplano Pauses Chile Operations Deal as It Reviews Strategy and Closes $1.06 Million Financing
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Altiplano Minerals ( (TSE:APN) ) just unveiled an update.

Altiplano Metals has provided an update on operations at its Santa Beatriz copper-gold-iron mine and the El Peñón processing plant in Chile, where it had entered a short-term rental-style agreement with contractor Andes Core Mining to manage mining and processing. Under the deal, ACM advanced underground development at several mine levels and mined 3,953 tonnes between November and January, generating US$31,625 in rental income for Altiplano under terms that also included per-tonne and monthly plant rental payments.

ACM was responsible for operating costs, mine development and maintenance while retaining the right to sell produced concentrates, but the arrangement has now been suspended as Altiplano undertakes a strategic review aimed at improving shareholder returns, with both operations placed on short-term care and maintenance. Separately, the company closed a private placement of 21,194,300 units at $0.05 per unit for gross proceeds of about $1.06 million, strengthening its balance sheet as it evaluates optimization plans and alternative operating or rental structures for its Chilean assets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:APN) stock is a Hold with a C$0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Altiplano Minerals stock, see the TSE:APN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:APN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:APN is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak profitability and negative operating cash flow despite strong revenue growth and high gross margin. Technical signals are mixed and do not indicate a sustained uptrend, and valuation is difficult to support with a negative P/E and no provided dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:APN stock, click here.

More about Altiplano Minerals

Altiplano Metals Inc. is a Canadian exploration and mining company focused on gold, silver and copper projects in the Americas. It holds a diversified portfolio that includes exploration properties, a developing copper-gold-iron mine and an operating copper-gold and iron processing facility, and prioritizes safe, sustainable production alongside reinvestment and acquisitions to build shareholder value.

Average Trading Volume: 88,553

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$8.52M

data.title: NatWest Completes £750m Share Buyback Programme
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from NatWest Group ( (GB:NWG) ).

NatWest Group has executed further purchases of its own ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange as part of its existing share buyback programme with Merrill Lynch International. The latest transaction involved 889,690 shares bought at a volume‑weighted average price of 588.56 pence, with the company intending to cancel the repurchased stock.

Following these trades, NatWest will hold 218,209,569 shares in treasury and have 7,981,690,983 shares in issue, excluding treasury holdings. The bank also confirmed completion of the buyback that began in July 2025, under which it has repurchased and cancelled 131,244,323 shares for a total consideration of £750 million, signalling ongoing capital returns to shareholders and a reduced free float.
